testcase.name: logout

error.message: Timed out waiting for driver server to shutdown. Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.17' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [a426c4011e735fca0e446d59d292685b, quit {}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.201, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.155 (07b52360cc1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\admin\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62011}, goog:processID: 13340, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62011/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.201, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: a426c4011e735fca0e446d59d292685b
